default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on scope and expectations for GrowthX's strategy sprint with Bubble, addressing concerns about the Statement of Work (SOW).](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Bubble seeks detailed SOW to ensure confidence before full engagement; open to refinement](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [GrowthX to provide holistic content strategy across channels, not just website/blog](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Clarified expectations: GrowthX to offer strategic recommendations for various content types, not full production](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Next meeting set for 3 PM Eastern on 8/25 to review revised SOW; aiming for pre-Labor Day signing](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)

## Topics

### SOW Refinement Process

  - [Bubble expanded SOW detail to ensure alignment before full engagement](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [GrowthX to revise SOW, explaining removals/changes to avoid perception of de-scoping](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Aim: Balance specificity Bubble needs with flexibility for GrowthX's proven process](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=593.0)
  - [Tatiana (Bubble) wants clear deliverables and 4-week strategy + 4-week test execution structure](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)

### Content Strategy Scope

  - [GrowthX to provide holistic strategy across channels (website, blog, YouTube, social, Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Clarified: GrowthX not responsible for full production on all channels](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Content OS to recommend topics/outlines for various content types](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=197.0)
  - [Bubble's internal teams will handle production for non-blog content](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=466.0)

### Timeline and Next Steps

  - [Meeting scheduled: 3 PM Eastern, 8/25, to review revised SOW](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=662.0)
  - [Target: Sign agreement before Labor Day (if language agreed upon quickly)](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=766.0)
  - [Bubble can expedite legal review if necessary](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)
  - [Aiming for project kickoff on 9/8, balancing speed with getting SOW right](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=759.0)

### GrowthX's Strategy Sprint Approach

  - [Gain comprehensive context](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Create key artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Align on quality benchmarks](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Produce calibration content](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Refine output](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)
  - [Transition to execution phase when consistently meeting quality bar](https://fathom.video/share/cTmLVJtQLD-RmSiyMy8t1S8pJQ5zvJgY?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)

## Next Steps

  - GrowthX to revise SOW based on discussion
  - Tyler to send meeting invite for 8/25 at 3 PM Eastern
  - Deedi to add Tatiana to the meeting invite
  - Both parties to prepare for SOW review meeting on 8/25
  - Aim for pre-Labor Day signing if SOW is quickly agreed upon

action_items.description: Ensure team prepares response to Bubble's SOW before 3pm ET 8/25 meeting
Prepare response to Bubble's SOW language; include explanations for any removals/changes. Ready by 3pm ET 8/25
Add Tatiana to 3pm ET 8/25 meeting w/ GrowthX; brief her on meeting purpose
